- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: citron-raid
logs.text:
> They've probably learned by now that daring to post anything pro-Trump in /r/politics might as well be Reddit suicide, so I don't blame them for avoiding that particular place like the plague.

I think this is a testimonial to how much a minority they are in their opinions, rather than /r/politics being some kind of anti-trump brigade.   If their own forums were not so tightly controlled, they'd realize this.  But it is in their modus operandi to accuse anyone who opposes their agenda as be

logs.name: cheesy-coverage
logs.text:
Well, firstly, they've probably learned by now that daring to post anything pro-Trump in /r/politics might as well be Reddit suicide, so I don't blame them for avoiding that particular place like the plague.

The top post of all time in /r/AskTrumpSupporters is pretty clearly accusing Trump of "spreading fake news", and they answered that one. 

The next one is about reports that he leaked classified information to reporters, and they answered that one. 

I don't think that it's fair to say that

logs.name: sunny-contrast
logs.text: @citron-raid, @cheesy-coverage, I'm so tired of this back-and-forth. Can't we just have a respectful discussion without resorting to name-calling and assumptions? I'm not saying that Trump supporters are a minority, but I do think that the Reddit community has a tendency to be quite biased towards one side of the political spectrum. I've seen many pro-Trump posts get downvoted into oblivion, while anti-Trump posts get a free pass. It's not about the mods being "tightly controlled," it's about the community's collective behavior. Let's focus on having a constructive conversation instead of trying to one-up each other.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@sunny-contrast, thank you for bringing a level head to this discussion. Let's keep the conversation civil and focused on the topic at hand. No personal attacks or assumptions, please. We're here to discuss and learn from each other's perspectives."

logs.name: similar-eel
logs.text: "@sunny-contrast, I'm glad you're speaking up for civility, but let's not pretend that the Reddit community is some kind of neutral space. I've been a journalist for over 20 years and I've seen firsthand how the platform's algorithms and user behavior can amplify certain viewpoints over others. It's not just about the mods, it's about the way the community rewards or punishes certain types of content. And let's be real, if you're a Trump supporter, you're going to get roasted on this site. It's not a level playing field, and it's not just about the mods being 'tightly controlled', it's about the collective bias of the community. I'm not saying that's a bad thing, but let's acknowledge it for what it is."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@similar-eel, your points are well-taken and provide a nuanced perspective on the issue. However, let's keep the discussion focused on the topic at hand and avoid making general statements about the community's bias. We appreciate your experience and insight, but let's not assume we're all aware of the intricacies of Reddit's algorithms and user behavior. Let's keep the conversation civil and on track."

logs.name: citron-raid
logs.text: "Are you kidding me with this touchy-feely nonsense? @similar-eel, you're just a self-righteous journalist trying to virtue signal and @moderator is eating it up. Newsflash: this isn't a 'community' - it's a bunch of entitled snowflakes crying about their feelings. And @sunny-contrast, you're just a sheep following the herd. If you can't handle a little bit of 'roasting', then maybe you should stick to your safe space. And by the way, what's with all the hand-wringing about bias? It's just the internet, folks. Get a grip.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@citron-raid, your response is not in line with our community guidelines. We encourage respectful dialogue, not personal attacks. Your comment is being removed for violating our rules. Please refrain from using derogatory language and personal insults in the future. If you continue to engage in this behavior, you may face further disciplinary action, up to and including a temporary ban."

logs.name: mild-field
logs.text: "@citron-raid, I'm shocked you're still here after that outburst. I've been a part of this community for a while now, and I've seen some heated discussions, but your response was just plain rude. Newsflash: just because you can say something doesn't mean you should. And another thing, what's with the 'entitled snowflakes' comment? That's just a cheap shot. I'm not sure what's more surprising, the fact that you said it or that you think it's an effective way to make a point. @moderator, I think you handled the situation well, as always. Keep up the good work!"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@mild-field, thank you for your thoughtful response. Your input is greatly appreciated. @citron-raid, I've issued a warning for violating our community guidelines. Please refrain from using derogatory language and personal insults in the future. If you continue to engage in this behavior, you may face further disciplinary action, up to and including a temporary ban."

logs.name: direct-energy
logs.text: "Hey @mild-field, I gotta say, I'm loving your response! You always bring a level head to these discussions. And @moderator, I think you're doing a great job too. I've been a part of this community for a bit now, and I've seen some pretty heated debates, but it's great to see people keeping it civil. Can we get back on topic though? What's everyone's take on the recent news about the new community center? I've been hearing some mixed reviews, and I'd love to hear some thoughts."

logs.name: citron-raid
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @moderator, you're just a bunch of out-of-touch bureaucrats trying to silence people who actually have something to say. @mild-field's response was way too soft, if you ask me. And what's with the 'community guidelines' nonsense? You're just trying to stifle free speech and keep the truth from coming out. I've been a part of this community for years, and I know how it really works. You're just a bunch of self-appointed'moderators' trying to control the narrative. And @direct-energy, you're just drinking the Kool-Aid, aren't you? Can't see the forest for the trees. Get back on topic? Ha! You're just trying to distract us from the real issues. The community center? Who cares? It's just a distraction from the real problems this community is facing. Wake up, sheeple!"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@citron-raid, your post is crossing the line into personal attacks and inflammatory language. Please refrain from making derogatory comments about other users and the moderation team. We're here to facilitate a respectful discussion, not to engage in personal feuds. Your post will be removed and you're issued a warning. Let's keep the focus on the topic at hand. If you'd like to discuss the community center, I'm happy to open a new thread for that."

logs.name: cheesy-roll
logs.text: "@citron-raid, I gotta say, I'm disappointed in your response. I've been following this thread and I think you're way off base. @moderator, I think you're right to step in and keep things civil. We can disagree without resorting to personal attacks. And @direct-energy, I think you're being a bit too quick to defend @citron-raid. Maybe take a step back and consider the bigger picture. We're all here to discuss and learn, not to stir up drama. Can we please keep the discussion on track and avoid the name-calling?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@citron-raid, your post has been removed for violating our community guidelines. @cheesy-roll, thank you for your constructive input. Let's keep the discussion civil and on topic."

logs.name: mild-field
logs.text: "@citron-raid, I'm glad someone finally stepped in to put a stop to your inflammatory language. I've been reading this thread and I have to say, I'm shocked by the personal attacks. It's not just about disagreeing with someone's opinion, it's about respecting others' feelings and opinions. I've been a part of this community for a while now, and I've seen some heated discussions, but never anything as hurtful as what you posted. Kudos to the moderator for keeping us in check. Let's keep the discussion civil and on topic, shall we?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion civil and on topic. No further action needed at this time."

logs.name: cheesy-roll
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @mild-field, you're just jumping on the bandwagon now? You've been a part of this community for a while, huh? I've been here just as long, and I've seen some pretty one-sided moderation in my time. It seems like @citron-raid got the short end of the stick here. I think it's time we start questioning the real agenda behind these moderation decisions. What's next, are we going to start censoring people for having an opinion that doesn't align with the moderator's views? I'm not buying it."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@cheesy-roll, let's keep the discussion civil and on topic. Your post seems to be veering off course. Please refrain from making accusations about the moderator's intentions. If you have concerns about moderation, I'd be happy to discuss them with you in a private message. Let's keep the conversation productive."

logs.name: mild-field
logs.text: "@cheesy-roll, I have to say, I'm a bit disappointed in your response. I've been a part of this community for a while, and I've seen some great discussions and debates. But this isn't the first time you've veered off course and started making accusations. I think @citron-raid's post was a bit inflammatory, and I'm glad the moderator stepped in to keep things civil. Let's focus on the topic at hand and avoid making assumptions about people's intentions. Can we please keep the discussion on track?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@cheesy-roll, @mild-field, let's keep the discussion civil and on topic. @cheesy-roll, I've issued a warning for veering off course and making accusations. @mild-field, your post is appreciated, but let's focus on the topic at hand. No further action will be taken at this time."

logs.name: cheesy-coverage
logs.text: "@mild-field, you think you're so perfect with your 'great discussions and debates' nonsense. I've been around this community longer than you, buddy. I know all about the 'great discussions' - they're just a bunch of sugarcoated opinions from people who can't handle the truth. And as for @citron-raid's post, it was a breath of fresh air. At least they had the guts to speak their mind, unlike some people who are too afraid to say what they really think. And by the way, what's with the 'let's keep the discussion on track' business? You sound like a robot. Can't you just let people have a real conversation for once?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@cheesy-coverage, your post is crossing the line. I've issued a warning for inflammatory language and disrespect towards other users. Let's keep the discussion civil and on topic. If you continue to disregard the rules, further action will be taken, up to and including a temporary ban. @mild-field, your post was appreciated, and I'm glad you spoke up. @cheesy-roll, I've already addressed your behavior in a previous post. Let's keep the discussion on track."

logs.name: sunny-contrast
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @cheesy-coverage, you think you're some kind of martyr just because you're'speaking your mind'? Newsflash: just because you have an opinion doesn't mean you have to be rude and condescending towards others. And @moderator, I'm shocked you're not taking this more seriously. 'Temporary ban' is not a deterrent for someone like @cheesy-coverage who seems to think they're above the rules. I've seen some pretty toxic behavior in my time on this forum, but this guy takes the cake. Can we please just have a respectful discussion for once without the personal attacks and inflammatory language?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@sunny-contrast, I appreciate your input, but let's keep the focus on the behavior rather than the individual. I've already addressed @cheesy-coverage's behavior, and I'll continue to monitor the situation. If the behavior persists, further action will be taken. Let's keep the discussion civil and on topic."

logs.name: mild-field
logs.text: "@sunny-contrast, I completely agree with you. It's about time someone spoke up about @cheesy-coverage's behavior. I've seen him post some pretty hurtful things, and it's not okay. I'm glad you're standing up for what's right. And @moderator, I appreciate your efforts to keep the discussion civil, but I think you should take a closer look at @cheesy-coverage's history. A temporary ban might not be enough to stop him, but it's a start. We need to set a good example for new users and make sure our community is a safe space for everyone."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @cheesy-coverage, your behavior is not acceptable and will not be tolerated.

logs.name: cheesy-roll
logs.text: "@mild-field, I don't think a temporary ban is the answer. That's just a slap on the wrist. If you're going to take action, do it right. @moderator, I've seen @cheesy-coverage's behavior too, and it's been going on for a while. It's not just about this one post or even this one incident. It's a pattern of behavior that needs to be addressed. A permanent ban would be more fitting, don't you think? And what about the people he's hurt? Shouldn't we be thinking about them too?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion focused on finding a solution. @cheesy-roll, I appreciate your input, but let's not jump to conclusions. We'll review @cheesy-coverage's history and consider all options before making a decision. @mild-field, your concerns are noted, and we'll take them into account. @cheesy-coverage, please refrain from responding until further notice."

logs.name: citron-raid
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? A permanent ban? That's just a joke. You're all just a bunch of snowflakes who can't handle a little bit of controversy. @cheesy-roll, you're just trying to stir up drama and get attention. And @moderator, you're just a puppet doing the bidding of the forum administrators. What's next, are you going to start censoring people for having different opinions? This is a joke, right? @mild-field, you're just a troll too, always trying to ruin the party. Get a life, dude."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@citron-raid, your inflammatory and insulting language is not acceptable. This is not a place for personal attacks or inflammatory rhetoric. Your post will be removed and you're issued a warning. Please refrain from posting such content in the future. If you continue to disregard the rules, further action may be taken, up to and including a temporary ban. Let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand."
